commands.name: audit
commands.purpose: Flagship. Run the type + lint gate against the installed package; report drift (literal values, reinvented components, missing `Field`, props that don't typecheck), then a judgment pass.

commands.name: migrate
commands.purpose: Convert legacy raw-CSS / hex / hand-rolled UI into Fuselage components + token references. Map by role, never by copying the old value.

commands.name: upgrade
commands.purpose: Upgrade the installed Fuselage version across releases, fixing breaking changes hop-by-hop with the gate as detector.

commands.name: polish
commands.purpose: Final pass: loading (`Throbber`), errors (`Callout` / `FieldError`), empty states, focus, state completeness. No new literals.

commands.name: harden
commands.purpose: Edge cases, i18n, RTL, error / disabled / loading paths, a11y, all through Fuselage.

commands.name: critique
commands.purpose: UX heuristics (hierarchy, cognitive load, IA). No code change, no gate.

commands.name: clarify
commands.purpose: UX copy, labels, error messages. Changes words, never Fuselage values.

commands.name: adapt
commands.purpose: Responsive behavior via `fuselage-hooks`, not media-query literals.

commands.name: shape
commands.purpose: Plan a feature as a Fuselage component composition tree. No code.

commands.name: craft
commands.purpose: Shape, then build the feature end to end under the laws.
